description_long: This handgun features a blocky, pixelated design with a predominantly dark purple and black color scheme, accented by muted greenish-yellow highlights. The upper portion of the firearm is adorned with a series of raised rectangular ridges, giving it a rugged, stylized appearance. The grip is thick and angular, with a checkered pattern that suggests improved handling and a visually distinct ergonomic contour. The trigger guard is large and squared, providing ample space and a robust look, while the barrel is short and integrated seamlessly into the slide, lacking any visible threading or porting. No visible manufacturer markings or engravings are present on the slide, maintaining a minimalist aesthetic. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, with no extensions or finger rests, contributing to the compact profile of the weapon.
description: A blocky, pixel-styled handgun with a dark purple and black color scheme, featuring raised ridges on the slide and a checkered, angular grip. The design is minimalist, with a squared trigger guard and a flat magazine base.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the checkered grip, raised slide ridges, and greenish-yellow accent lines near the grip and trigger guard.
description_view_1: The front view shows the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the slide ridges, emphasizing the compact width.
description_view_2: The right side view displays the blocky grip, the squared trigger guard, and the continuous dark color scheme with minimal accenting.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the back of the grip and the slide, showing the flat magazine base and the overall thickness of the handgun.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is thick, angular, and features a checkered pattern for enhanced traction. Its blocky contour provides a firm hold, and the surface appears to be made of matte plastic with no visible logos or finger grooves. The design is utilitarian, with subtle greenish-yellow highlights adding visual interest.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large, squared, and robust, with a thick profile and no undercuts or integrated accessories. Its edges are straight and unembellished, contributing to the overall blocky aesthetic of the handgun.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and seamlessly integrated into the slide, with a smooth, unmarked exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte, dark coloration of the rest of the handgun.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, maintaining a minimalist and stylized appearance.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extensions, flares, or finger rests. Its design is simple and functional, with no visible logos or texturing.
